user_feedback:

analysis:
- Issue identified: Currently there are 5 levels, but the user wants 9 levels organized into 3 difficulty sets (3 easy, 3 medium, 3 hard). Need to add 4 new levels at specific positions and add explicit difficulty labels.
- Files affected: globals.js (LEVELS array), rendering.js (UI to show difficulty), input.js (hardcoded level count check), index.html (description text)
- Changes needed: 
  1. Create 4 new level configurations (before L1, before L3, after L4, after L5)
  2. Add "difficulty" property to all levels
  3. Update rendering to display difficulty
  4. Update hardcoded references from 5 to 9 levels
  5. Update game description
